title: KB Project Manifest
description: Schema for per-project .meta/manifest.json. Tracks source file hashes for incremental rebuilds, manifest file hashes for service re-discovery skipping, and generator version metadata for drift detection.

files.description: Map of source-file path (relative to project root) to hash + analysis metadata.

contributed_to.description: KB docs this file contributed content to. Used to mark those docs stale on file change.

manifests.description: Optional: map of manifest-file path (compose, k8s, workspace, Procfile, CI) to hash. In incremental mode, if all entries are unchanged, Phase 1 service re-discovery is skipped.

generator.description: Optional: generator metadata used by Step 3.6 drift detection. Bump any field here to force incremental gap-fill to regenerate affected docs.

kb_engineer_version.description: Semver or short hash of the kb-engineer agent that generated this KB.

skill_versions.description: Map of skill name to version integer (e.g. kb-generation, kb-query, kb-identity).

schema_versions.description: Map of schema name to version integer (graph, frontmatter, manifest).

template_hashes.description: Map of template filename to sha256 of its contents at generation time.
